tool_args.label: MV Contract Not Extended
tool_args.raw_text: NYC Transit has chosen not to exercise its option to extend MV's contract due to persistent compliance failures and marginal performance

payload.claim_text: NYC Transit has chosen not to exercise its option to extend MV's contract due to persistent compliance failures and marginal performance, which MV has been unable to resolve despite numerous opportunities to cure.
payload.description: MV Transportation Primary Carrier contract not extended

tool_args.label: Primary Carrier Trips Proportion
tool_args.raw_text: Approximately 21 percent of all AAR trips are performed using the Primary Carrier mode of service for AAR customers.

payload.claim_text: Approximately 21 percent of all AAR trips are performed using the Primary Carrier mode of service for AAR customers.
payload.description: Proportion of Access-A-Ride trips using Primary Carrier service

tool_args.label: AAR Ridership Trends
tool_args.raw_text: Paratransit continues to experience increasing AAR ridership trends. All-time highs were met in the fourth quarter of 2024

payload.claim_text: Paratransit continues to experience increasing AAR ridership trends. All-time highs were met in the fourth quarter of 2024, and continued growth is expected into the first and second quarters of 2025.
payload.description: Access-A-Ride ridership reached all-time highs in Q4 2024 with continued growth expected

tool_args.label: CPI Increase for Paratransit Pricing
tool_args.raw_text: Consumer Price Index, which has increased by approximately 18.75 percent over the last four years

payload.claim_text: The pricing in these contracts is adjusted annually based on the Consumer Price Index, which has increased by approximately 18.75 percent over the last four years.
payload.description: CPI-based pricing adjustment for paratransit contracts

tool_args.label: EV Charging Stations - Paratransit Pilot
tool_args.raw_text: Modification 1 enabled the Primary Carriers to install two dual electric vehicle ("EV") charging stations at each of their operating facilities, as Paratransit is currently piloting 15 EV paratransit buses.

tool_args.label: Kawasaki Fleet Coverage - Subway Cars
tool_args.raw_text: NYC Transit's R62, R68A, R142A, R143, R160, R188, and R211 subway cars

payload.claim_text: KRC is the sole responsible source for parts required for NYC Transit's R62, R68A, R142A, R143, R160, R188, and R211 subway cars; LIRR's C-3 coach and M-9 electric railcars; and MNR's M-8 electric railcars.
payload.description: Fleet types covered by Kawasaki replacement parts contract

tool_args.label: Kawasaki Subcontractor Relationships
tool_args.raw_text: KRC is also the sole distributor and reseller for Toshiba International Corporation...Fuji Electric Corporation of America...Koito Industries

payload.description: Kawasaki subcontracts with Toshiba, Fuji Electric, and Koito Industries
